revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Ambox]]
#REDIRECT [[Template:Ambox]]

{{ #ifeq: {{{image}}} | none | | }} {{ #if: {{{imageright|}}} | }}
{{ #switch: {{{image|{{{type|}}}}}} | serious = [[Image:Stop hand nuvola.svg|40px]] | content = [[Image:Emblem-important.svg|40px]] | style = [[Image:Broom icon.svg|40px]] | merge = [[Image:Merge-split-transwiki default.svg]] | notice = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] | blank = [[Image:No image.svg]] | #default = {{{image|[[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]]}}} }}{{{text}}}{{{imageright}}}
{{ Template sandbox notice }} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: Changed design based off of [[Wikipedia:Deletion message boxes]] by [[User:Edokter]]
revision.text:
{{ #ifeq: {{{image}}} | none | | }} {{ #if: {{{imageright|}}} | }}
{{ #switch: {{{image|{{{type|}}}}}} | serious = [[Image:Stop hand nuvola.svg|20px]] | content = [[Image:Emblem-important.svg|20px]] | style = [[Image:Broom icon.svg|20px]] | merge = [[Image:Merge-split-transwiki default.svg]] | notice = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|20px]] | blank = [[Image:No image.svg]] | #default = {{{image|[[Image:Info non-talk.png|20px]]}}} }}{{{text}}}{{{imageright}}}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Code derived from imbox, updated to standardised talk page brown style, trying the darker grey border other boxes uses on the move type. This code is NOT ready, but is a basis for discussion.
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none | | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}} | }}
{{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | speedy = [[Image:Imbox speedy deletion.png|40x40px]] | delete = [[Image:Imbox deletion.png|40x40px]] | content = [[Image:Imbox content.png|40x40px]] | style = [[Image:Imbox style.png|40x40px]] | move = [[Image:Imbox move.png|40x40px]] | protection = [[Image:Imbox protection.png|40x40px]] | notice | #default = [[Image:Imbox notice.png|40x40px]] }} }} {{{text}}} {{{imageright}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Removed the border colour test from the "move" type. The standardised talk page border does look best.
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none | | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}} | }}
{{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | speedy = [[Image:Imbox speedy deletion.png|40x40px]] | delete = [[Image:Imbox deletion.png|40x40px]] | content = [[Image:Imbox content.png|40x40px]] | style = [[Image:Imbox style.png|40x40px]] | move = [[Image:Imbox move.png|40x40px]] | protection = [[Image:Imbox protection.png|40x40px]] | notice | #default = [[Image:Imbox notice.png|40x40px]] }} }} {{{text}}} {{{imageright}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Protected Template:Tmbox: Semi-protecting since going to announce this template in many places and its sister templates have been vandalised. [edit=autoconfirmed:move=sysop]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none | | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}} | }}
{{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | speedy = [[Image:Imbox speedy deletion.png|40x40px]] | delete = [[Image:Imbox deletion.png|40x40px]] | content = [[Image:Imbox content.png|40x40px]] | style = [[Image:Imbox style.png|40x40px]] | move = [[Image:Imbox move.png|40x40px]] | protection = [[Image:Imbox protection.png|40x40px]] | notice | #default = [[Image:Imbox notice.png|40x40px]] }} }} {{{text}}} {{{imageright}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:Tmbox]]": Once deployed will be high-risk very fast. (Sister template imbox went from 0 to 630,000 pages literally over night.) [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none | | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}} | }}
{{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | speedy = [[Image:Imbox speedy deletion.png|40x40px]] | delete = [[Image:Imbox deletion.png|40x40px]] | content = [[Image:Imbox content.png|40x40px]] | style = [[Image:Imbox style.png|40x40px]] | move = [[Image:Imbox move.png|40x40px]] | protection = [[Image:Imbox protection.png|40x40px]] | notice | #default = [[Image:Imbox notice.png|40x40px]] }} }} {{{text}}} {{{imageright}}}
{{Documentation}}

{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none | | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}} | }}
{{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | speedy = [[Image:Imbox speedy deletion.png|40x40px]] | delete = [[Image:Imbox deletion.png|40x40px]] | content = [[Image:Imbox content.png|40x40px]] | style = [[Image:Imbox style.png|40x40px]] | move = [[Image:Imbox move.png|40x40px]] | protection = [[Image:Imbox protection.png|40x40px]] | notice | #default = [[Image:Imbox notice.png|40x40px]] }} }} {{{text}}} {{{imageright}}}
{{pp-template|small=yes}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding the coloured borders since we are 2 editors for them and 1 against them so far. So more people will see the suggested styles and be inclined to discuss them.
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none | | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}} | }}
{{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | speedy = [[Image:Imbox speedy deletion.png|40x40px]] | delete = [[Image:Imbox deletion.png|40x40px]] | content = [[Image:Imbox content.png|40x40px]] | style = [[Image:Imbox style.png|40x40px]] | move = [[Image:Imbox move.png|40x40px]] | protection = [[Image:Imbox protection.png|40x40px]] | notice | #default = [[Image:Imbox notice.png|40x40px]] }} }} {{{text}}} {{{imageright}}}
{{pp-template|small=yes}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Changed to no border for the "protection" type. More in line with current discussion on [[Template talk:Tmbox/styles]]. (But this is still just a demo, we do not have a final consensus.)
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none | | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}} | }}
{{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | speedy = [[Image:Imbox speedy deletion.png|40x40px]] | delete = [[Image:Imbox deletion.png|40x40px]] | content = [[Image:Imbox content.png|40x40px]] | style = [[Image:Imbox style.png|40x40px]] | move = [[Image:Imbox move.png|40x40px]] | protection = [[Image:Imbox protection.png|40x40px]] | notice | #default = [[Image:Imbox notice.png|40x40px]] }} }} {{{text}}} {{{imageright}}}
{{pp-template|small=yes}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: why do we handle smallimageright=none and not imageright=none?
Autocategorize talk message box templates, per proposal
Adding "nocat=true" category suppression. Templates that just used {{tmbox}} in their documentation were categorised.

revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|tmbox}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>
{{#invoke:Message box|tmbox}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>
{{#invoke:Message box|tmbox}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing visual file changer
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|tmbox}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>
{{#invoke:Message box|tmbox}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>
{{#invoke:Message box|tmbox}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|tmbox}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|tmbox}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|tmbox}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]
{{#invoke:Message box|tmbox}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|tmbox}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
